title: gentiana lingulata var. praecox
intro: Gentiana lingulata var. praecox, also known as an alpine gentian, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Gentiana lingulata var. praecox include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
